problem_id.title: Fizzbuzz
problem_id.description: Create the fizzbuzz function that if the number is divisible by 3, return 'Fizz', if it is divisible by 5, return 'Buzz', and if it is divisible by both, return 'FizzBuzz'.

problem_id.title: Binary Search
problem_id.description: Create a binary search function without using recursion.

problem_id.title: Reverse String
problem_id.description: Write a function that reverses a string.
